meaning: n.弯刀,半月形刀,单刃刀,曲剑
examples: I saw a man standing on a raised dais, under two giant scimitar swords.
Turkish sword or scimitar having a double - curved blade and an eared pommel, but lacking a handle guard.
Two species, the Scimitar-horned oryx and pere David's deer are extinct in the wild, and only live on in captivity.
It is now almost extinct, and another - the scimitar-horned oryx of the Sahara - is on the endangered list.
Test this electoral strength against, say, the might of the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, and it seems like a scimitar taking on an Uzi.
